provenance.note: Dogger Bank - North Sea approach used by Kent/London/Essex/Hull
Straits of Dover - primary England/Burgundy Channel fixture crossing
The Channel - wider England/Normandy Channel fixture crossing
Cote D'Argent - Gascon/Cantabrian approach shared by England and Castile fixture ports
Cantabrian Sea - Castilian Galicia/Asturias fixture approach
Lusitanian Sea - Portuguese Atlantic coast shared by Castilian Galicia
Gulf of Cadiz - Portuguese Algarve/Lisboa approach
Straits of Gibraltar - primary Portugal/Castile Iberian fixture crossing
Gulf of Valencia - Aragonese Mediterranean fixture base
Gulf of Lion - Aragonese/Burgundian Mediterranean fixture approach
Picardie - Burgundy-held hostile Channel interception fixture port
Vlaanderen - Flanders secondary Channel interception fixture port
Caux - England-held Normandy Channel fixture port
The Baleares - Aragon Mediterranean island fixture port
Cotentin - England-held Normandy Channel fixture port
